summary: Ukrainian long‑range strike hit a Russian oil‑processing plant 500 km from the front, and multiple UAV attacks caused civilian casualties in Nikopol and other settlements. Russia reported shooting down 10 UAVs bound for Moscow and claimed destruction of Ukrainian drone command points in Zaporizhzhia. Both sides continue intensive drone and missile activity across several fronts.
key_points: Ukrainian long‑range strike damaged an oil‑processing plant in the Moscow region, 500 km from the front (Source: @UkraineNow/81976).
Three civilians were killed by an FPV drone in Nikopol, Dnipropetrovsk region (Source: @UkraineNow/81974).
Russia’s air defence downed 10 UAVs heading toward Moscow (Source: @tass_agency/380986).
Russian MoD claimed UAVs destroyed Ukrainian drone command points in Zaporizhzhia oblast (Source: @tass_agency/380995).
Ukrainian MoD reported 172 enemy drones shot down and listed numerous drone attacks across Russian regions (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
A Ukrainian Su‑24M crashed during a mission over Khmelnytskyi region, killing both crew members (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67825).
UAV activity reported near Solone (north‑east), Sumy, and Zaporizhzhia regions (Source: @kpszsu/65387, @kpszsu/65360, @kpszsu/65386).
A rocket was launched toward Donetsk near Novomykolayivka (Source: @kpszsu/65359).

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian long‑range strike damaged a Russian oil‑processing plant 500 km from the front, highlighting deep‑strike capability. Russia intensified air‑defence, downing 10 UAVs bound for Moscow and claiming destruction of Ukrainian drone command nodes in Zaporizhzhia. Both sides sustain high‑tempo UAV and missile operations across multiple fronts.

points: Ukrainian forces employed a long‑range strike that damaged an oil‑processing plant in the Moscow region, located approximately 500 km from the front line (Source: @UkraineNow/81976).
A Ukrainian Su‑24M of the 7th Tactical Aviation Brigade crashed while conducting a mission over Khmelnytskyi region; both the pilot and navigator were killed (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67825).
UAVs were observed operating near Solone on a north‑east course, and in Sumy region north‑west of Hotin with variable heading (Source: @kpszsu/65387, @kpszsu/65360).
UAV activity was reported in Zaporizhzhia oblast north of Vilnyansk, heading west or south‑west (Source: @kpszsu/65386).
Ukrainian MoD reported shooting down 172 enemy drones and listed attacks on Russian oil depots, agricultural sites, and civilian areas across multiple regions (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian forces claimed a rocket launch toward Donetsk near Novomykolayivka (Source: @kpszsu/65359).
Ukrainian long‑range strike contributed to logistical disruption of Russian fuel supply chains (Source: @UkraineNow/81976).
Russian air‑defence forces downed 10 UAVs that were heading toward Moscow, as reported by Moscow mayor Sergei Sobyanin (Source: @tass_agency/380986).
The Russian Ministry of Defence announced the destruction of Ukrainian drone command points in Zaporizhzhia oblast (Source: @tass_agency/380995).
Russian reports indicated a fire at an oil depot in the Krasnodar region village of Poltava following a drone strike (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Russian forces reported civilian casualties from Ukrainian drone attacks in the Bryansk, Belgorod, and Kharkiv regions, including injuries and deaths (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
A Russian UAV attack on a car in Dorogoshch, Graivoron district, caused shrapnel injuries to two men (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Russian authorities noted ongoing high‑intensity battles for Stepnogorsk on the Zaporozhye front, with attacks on rear areas and energy facilities (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Russian MoD claimed liberation of the village of Dolgaia Balka southwest of Konstantinovsk (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian UAVs operated near Solone, moving north‑east across the Dnipropetrovsk/Kamianets area (Source: @kpszsu/65387).
A Ukrainian FPV drone struck a civilian convoy in Nikopol, killing three people (Source: @UkraineNow/81974).
Russian reports of Ukrainian drone attacks on agricultural facilities near Selishche, Pochepsky district, resulting in three mechanic deaths (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian forces reported infantry battles in Bachivsk, Ivolzhansk, and Nova Sich on the Sumy front (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian attacks targeted the Stepnogorsk area on the Zaporozhye front, causing civilian casualties and energy facility damage (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian UAV activity reported north of Vilnyansk in Zaporizhzhia, heading west/south‑west (Source: @kpszsu/65386).
Ukrainian drone attacks on the Donetsk‑Mariupol highway resulted in civilian deaths and serious injuries (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
UAVs detected in Sumy region north‑west of Hotin with variable course (Source: @kpszsu/65360).
Reactive UAV observed heading toward Sumy city from the north (Source: @kpszsu/65376).
Ukrainian MoD reported 172 enemy drones shot down, many operating over northern Russian territories (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Russian forces reported drone attacks on civilian infrastructure in the Bryansk region (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian infantry battles continued in forested areas near Mikhailovka and along railway tracks in Krasnopolsky district (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian forces claimed advances of up to 500 m in nine sectors on the Volchansk sector of the Kharkiv front (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian UAV activity noted near the Black Sea heading toward Chornomorsk (Source: @kpszsu/65374).
Ukrainian long‑range strike hit an oil‑processing plant in the Moscow region, a key logistical node for southern Russian fuel distribution (Source: @UkraineNow/81976).
Ukrainian forces reported attacks on a fuel depot in Poltavska station, Kuban, a critical link for fuel to Krasnodar and Adygea (Source: @UkraineNow/81956).
Ukrainian drone attacks in the Kherson region injured civilians in Gornostevka and Novozburivka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Russian reports of Ukrainian drone attacks on the Donetsk‑Mariupol highway causing civilian casualties (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian MoD listed attacks on Russian oil depots in Krasnodar region, causing fires (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian UAV activity reported near the Black Sea corridor, potentially targeting southern maritime routes (Source: @kpszsu/65374).
Russian forces reported drone strikes on civilian areas in the Kherson region, including a bus stop in Shebekino (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Russian air‑defence downed 10 UAVs heading for Moscow, indicating heightened air‑defence activity over the capital (Source: @tass_agency/380986).
Ukrainian MoD reported shooting down 172 enemy drones across multiple Russian regions (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Russian MoD claimed destruction of Ukrainian drone command points in Zaporizhzhia oblast (Source: @tass_agency/380995).
Ukrainian UAVs conducted attacks on oil depots in Krasnodar and on agricultural facilities in Bryansk (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
A Ukrainian Su‑24M was lost during a mission over Khmelnytskyi region, highlighting risks to tactical aviation (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67825).
Ukrainian UAV activity observed near Sumy, Zaporizhzhia, and the Black Sea, indicating dispersed air‑operational pressure (Source: @kpszsu/65360, @kpszsu/65386, @kpszsu/65374).
Russian reports of drone attacks causing civilian injuries in multiple oblasts, including Belgorod and Kharkiv (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).

key_developments: Ukrainian long‑range strike damaged a Russian oil‑processing plant 500 km from the front, disrupting fuel logistics (Source: @UkraineNow/81976).
Three civilians killed by an FPV drone in Nikopol, highlighting continued UAV threat to rear areas (Source: @UkraineNow/81974).
Russia’s air‑defence downed 10 UAVs bound for Moscow, showing heightened protection of the capital (Source: @tass_agency/380986).
Russian MoD announced destruction of Ukrainian drone command nodes in Zaporizhzhia, indicating counter‑UAV operations (Source: @tass_agency/380995).
Ukrainian MoD reported 172 enemy drones shot down across Russian territory, reflecting intense aerial contest (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30937).
Ukrainian Su‑24M crash in Khmelnytskyi region resulted in loss of two crew members, affecting tactical aviation assets (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67825).
Rocket launch toward Donetsk near Novomykolayivka demonstrates continued missile strikes on contested zones (Source: @kpszsu/65359).
sections.threat_assessment: Ukrainian forces are extending strike range into Russian interior logistics hubs, while maintaining aggressive UAV operations against civilian and military targets. Russian air‑defence is increasingly effective over strategic cities, yet UAV threats persist across multiple fronts, causing civilian casualties. Both sides are escalating drone and missile use, indicating a sustained high‑intensity conflict with expanding operational depth.
sections.regional_response: Russian authorities are reinforcing air‑defence around Moscow and claiming successful counter‑UAV actions in Zaporizhzhia, while publicizing civilian impact of Ukrainian attacks to bolster domestic resolve. Ukrainian leadership highlights deep‑strike successes and seeks to leverage international support for continued offensive capabilities. Local administrations in affected oblasts are reporting casualties and infrastructure damage, prompting emergency response measures.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of UAV flight paths shows a pattern of north‑east and north‑west vectors targeting rear areas in Dnipropetrovsk, Sumy, and Zaporizhzhia. The loss of a Su‑24M suggests heightened risk for tactical aviation during strike missions over contested zones. Continued Russian claims of drone command node destruction should be cross‑checked with independent SIGINT to assess actual UAV operational capacity.
